title: gouldia antiqua var. hirtellifolia
intro: Gouldia antiqua var. hirtellifolia is a rare and lesser-known plant species, which is a variant of the Gouldia antiqua plant, native to the tropical forests of Hawaii. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gouldia antiqua var. hirtellifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
